message:
feat(suite,runtime): enrich suite manifest with report paths; drain effect queue on shutdown

SuiteManifest now records summary_path, report_log/json/html paths, and
report_failed flag. Manifest is written after report generation so artifact
paths are accurate. In ftui-runtime, replace bare bool with EffectLoopControl
enum and drain queued tasks before exiting on shutdown request.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
